blended.narrative: Discovery is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,996 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 10" over the past week. Current depth: 49".
